testset: ExtendedHubbard1D — ChargeGap V=0 delegation to Hubbard1D (#381 batch 6)
refs: ExtendedHubbard1D at V=0 ≡ Lieb-Wu Hubbard1D at half-filling ⇒ ChargeGap delegation equality | structural delegation test (1e-12 = float identity vs precomputed Lieb-Wu reference, not physical precision)
srctext: verify(ExtendedHubbard1D(; 1.0 = 1.0, 1.0 = 1.0, V = 0.0), ChargeGap(), Infinite(); route = :delegation_invariant, independent = (Dict((1.0, 1.0) => 0.005026732898582302, (1.0, 4.0) => 1.2867270220129354, (0.5, 4.0) => 2.339758553732098))[(1.0, 1.0)], agree_within = 1.0e-12, refs = ["ExtendedHubbard1D at V=0 ≡ Lieb-Wu Hubbard1D at half-filling ⇒ ChargeGap delegation equality", "structural delegation test (1e-12 = float identity vs precomputed Lieb-Wu reference, not physical precision)"])

testset: Heisenberg1D GroundStateEnergyDensity — verification cards

testset: TightBinding1D — finite-T thermodynamics
refs: Mahan, Many-Particle Physics §1.3: free-fermion β → 0⁺ limit ω → -T log 2 per site
srctext: verify(QAtlas.TightBinding1D(; 1.0 = 1.0, μ = 0.0), QAtlas.FreeEnergy(), QAtlas.Infinite(); route = :limiting_case, fetch_kw = (; beta = 0.001), independent = -(log(2)) / 0.001, agree_within = abs(log(2) / 0.001) * 0.002, refs = ["Mahan, Many-Particle Physics §1.3: free-fermion β → 0⁺ limit ω → -T log 2 per site"])

testset: TFIM — ED ground state vs BdG analytical (verify cards + structural)
refs: Independent dense-ED of build_tfim Lattice2D OBC chain (eigvals of Symmetric H = -J Σ σᶻσᶻ − h Σ σˣ) — cross-checks BdG analytical Energy OBC
srctext: verify(TFIM(; 1.0 = 1.0, 0.0 = 0.0), Energy(), OBC(4); route = :ed_finite_size, independent = (sort(eigvals(Symmetric(build_tfim(build_lattice(Square, 4, 1; boundary = OpenAxis()), 1.0, 0.0)))))[1], agree_within = max(1.0e-12, 1.0e-10 * abs((sort(eigvals(Symmetric(build_tfim(build_lattice(Square, 4, 1; boundary = OpenAxis()), 1.0, 0.0)))))[1])), at = ["J=$(1.0)", "h=$(0.0)", "N=$(4)"], refs = ["Independent dense-ED of build_tfim Lattice2D OBC chain (eigvals of Symmetric H = -J Σ σᶻσᶻ − h Σ σˣ) — cross-checks BdG analytical Energy OBC"])

testset: Limiting cases (verify cards + structural)
refs: Classical Ising limit h=0: E_0^OBC = -J(N-1) exact (independent of dense ED)
srctext: verify(TFIM(; 1.0 = 1.0, h = 0.0), Energy(), OBC(6); route = :limiting_case, independent = -1.0 * (6 - 1), agree_within = 1.0e-12, at = ["J=$(1.0)", "h=0.0", "N=$(6)"], refs = ["Classical Ising limit h=0: E_0^OBC = -J(N-1) exact (independent of dense ED)"])

testset: Limiting cases (verify cards + structural)
refs: Strong-field PT² limit h ≫ J: E_0^OBC ≈ -hN - J²(N-1)/(4h) (Rayleigh-Schrödinger, |+⟩^N unperturbed g.s., bond perturbation V = -J Σ σᶻσᶻ)
srctext: verify(TFIM(; 1.0 = 1.0, h = 100.0), Energy(), OBC(6); route = :limiting_case, independent = -100.0 * 6 - (1.0 ^ 2 * (6 - 1)) / (4 * 100.0), agree_within = max(1.0e-12, 1.0e-9 * abs(-100.0 * 6 - (1.0 ^ 2 * (6 - 1)) / (4 * 100.0))), at = ["J=$(1.0)", "h=$(100.0)", "N=$(6)"], refs = ["Strong-field PT² limit h ≫ J: E_0^OBC ≈ -hN - J²(N-1)/(4h) (Rayleigh-Schrödinger, |+⟩^N unperturbed g.s., bond perturbation V = -J Σ σᶻσᶻ)"])

testset: Cross-check: TFIM sparse ED ↔ BdG E₀ at N=14, 16 (OBC) — verify cards
refs: Independent sparse-ED via build_tfim_sparse (KrylovKit Lanczos, krylovdim=30, tol=1e-11) on the real-space 2^N basis — pushes the BdG cross-check past dense-ED reach (N ≤ 12)
srctext: verify(TFIM(; 1.0 = 1.0, 1.0 = 1.0), Energy(), OBC(14); route = :ed_finite_size, independent = vals[1], agree_within = max(1.0e-10, 1.0e-8 * abs(vals[1])), at = ["J=$(1.0)", "h=$(1.0)", "N=$(14)"], refs = ["Independent sparse-ED via build_tfim_sparse (KrylovKit Lanczos, krylovdim=30, tol=1e-11) on the real-space 2^N basis — pushes the BdG cross-check past dense-ED reach (N ≤ 12)"])
